headline: Arista Networks Inc (NYSE:ANET) Hits All CAN SLIM Criteria for Growth Investors
summary: Arista Networks (ANET) passes the CAN SLIM test with strong earnings, zero debt, and a 92 Relative Strength score, making it a top growth stock pick in a bullish market.
